overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character fishing in a shallow river with a large waterfall backdrop. The character stands in clear water surrounded by forested rocky cliffs, repeatedly casting and reeling a fishing line in a tranquil natural setting.

events.description: character casts fishing line into the river creating ripples on the surface
fish struggles on the line creating splashes and disturbance in the water
character reels in the fishing line while rod bends under tension

agents.ego_description: standing in shallow river water facing the waterfall, repeatedly casting and reeling a fishing line

entered.detail: tall white waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face into the river pool
steep gray rock formation with sparse vegetation rising above the left bank
steep rock face with layered sedimentary structure on the right side
dense cluster of green coniferous trees lining the left river bank
thick forest vegetation covering the right bank and cliff base
clear shallow water with visible rocky and pebble bottom

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary in a shallow river surrounded by dense forest and rocky cliffs, facing a majestic waterfall in the distance. Bright natural sunlight illuminates the scene as the character engages in repetitive fishing actions, casting the line toward the center of the river and reeling it back while water splashes indicate fish activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective of a tranquil river scene centered on a character fishing beneath a towering waterfall. It begins with the character standing stationary in the shallow, clear water, surrounded by the imposing presence of dense forests and rocky cliffs. As the character repeatedly casts the line toward the center of the river, the bright natural sunlight highlights the shimmering surface of the water. The scene remains focused on these rhythmic fishing actions, with the camera capturing the splashes of fish activity against the backdrop of the distant, cascading falls.
